slice: Traced the Builder to Repository to Studio Happy Flow live and fixed the real gap: a Scene's converged Representation was appended after a World Builder template's legacy, unfilled Representations in theme.representations, so Creation Flow's carousel (always starting at index 0) applied the empty legacy one on a naive Start Creating click -- Theme Application worked correctly, the wrong Representation just rendered no authored content. Fixed by prepending Scene-derived Representations in builder.js's convergeScenes(). Export investigated and confirmed already correct: it reads the identical project.lastBuild object Publish does, with embedded bytes confined to the assets side-map (required for a portable, self-contained package) and zero embedded data URIs in manifest/theme fields. Also fixed ThemeRepositoryClient.reset() reporting a false success when RLS silently blocks the delete. goldenBuild.js 30/30 unchanged; new 15-assertion Happy Flow suite passes
